name: Implementation Core Pack
description: A disciplined implementation workflow for context loading, source-grounded decisions, API design, incremental delivery, monorepo awareness, and tests.
useCases: Load project context and constraints before changing code so local agents follow the existing architecture.
Design stable APIs and module boundaries before implementation work crosses package or service seams.
Deliver features in small, test-backed increments that stay reviewable and easy to roll back.
Coordinate monorepo changes across packages, dependencies, build targets, and focused validation commands.
examplePrompts: Read the relevant project context, identify existing patterns, then propose the smallest implementation plan for this change.
Design the API or interface for this feature, including types, error behavior, compatibility, and migration concerns.
Implement this feature incrementally with focused tests after each slice and avoid unrelated refactors.
Map the monorepo impact of this change, including affected packages, dependency edges, commands to run, and review risks.
